ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., 3B, SS, LF) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Player's batting and throwing handedness (e.g., R/R, L/L, S/R) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Player's contract status (e.g., Signed, Free Agent) */,
  "contract_years_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of years remaining on the player's contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Player's annual salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player corresponding to the metrics */,
  "season" TEXT /* The season for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date when the metrics were last updated */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Total games started by the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Total at-bats by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits made by the player */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Total doubles hit by the player */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Total triples hit by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Total home runs hit by the player */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Total runs batted in by the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Total stolen bases by the player */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Total times caught stealing by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total walks by the player */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts by the player */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage of the player */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage of the player */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging percentage of the player */,
  "pitching_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of pitching appearances */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Total innings pitched */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Total earned runs */,
  "walks_allowed" INTEGER /* Total walks allowed */,
  "strikeouts_given" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts given */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks plus hits per inning pitched */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Player's fielding percentage */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Total errors made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Total putouts made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is based */,
  "established" TEXT /* Date the team was established */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Team's win percentage for the current season */,
  "division" TEXT /* The division the team belongs to (e.g., AL East, NL West) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Team's current rank in the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team in the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the game was home or away */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game (e.g., 5-3) */,
  "winning_team" TEXT /* Name of the winning team */,
  "losing_team" TEXT /* Name of the losing team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game (e.g., Sunny, Rainy) */,
  "umpire" TEXT /* Name of the home plate umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the scout */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of scouting experience */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the scout belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the scout */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the scout */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the scout was hired */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., Pitching, Hitting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
